{"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","content":{"stdout":"usage: block_quality_check.py [-h] [--check-blocks CHECK_BLOCKS]
                              [--retry-failed] [--status] [--json]
                              [--no-manifest-update]
                              meeting_path

Block Quality Check - validate generated meeting blocks meet quality standards

positional arguments:
  meeting_path          Path to meeting folder

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --check-blocks CHECK_BLOCKS
                        Comma-separated block codes to check (B01,B08)
  --retry-failed        Re-check previously failed blocks
  --status              Show quality status and exit
  --json                Output results as JSON
  --no-manifest-update  Don't update manifest with results
